description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: Use the quote tool to configure a 5 kW residential system for a single-family home at ZIP 94110 with 1200 sq ft of roof area and a $150 monthly electric bill, then save any quote whose estimated monthly payment is under $120.

tasks.instruction: On the residential solar packages page, look at systems between 6 kW and 8 kW sorted by lowest total price, compare the first two results, and add to your quote the one priced under $15,000 with a panel warranty of at least 20 years (choose the cheaper one if both qualify).

criteria.selection_rule: among the first two sorted results, choose any package under the price and warranty thresholds; if both qualify, choose the cheaper one

tasks.instruction: Schedule a virtual residential solar consultation for ZIP 78704 at the earliest available weekday 10:00 AM time slot and submit the booking form.

criteria.selection_rule: choose the earliest available matching slot by date and time

tasks.instruction: In the blog, search for information about the federal solar tax credit, filter results to the last 12 months, sort by most recent, and save the most recent relevant article to your reading list with an "Incentives 2024" tag.

target_names: 2026 Federal Solar Tax Credit Guide: What Homeowners Need to Know

criteria.relevance_rule: title or tags must indicate federal solar tax credit content
criteria.selection_rule: choose the first (most recent) relevant article after filtering and sorting

tasks.instruction: Use the savings calculator for ZIP 85001 with a $200 monthly electric bill, adjust the residential system size until the estimated annual savings reach at least $1,500, then save the scenario with the name "Target $1500+ savings."

tasks.instruction: Find solar installers within 25 miles of ZIP 30301, filter to those with at least a 4.5-star rating and 50 or more reviews, sort by highest rating, and send a contact message to the top result.

criteria.selection_rule: choose the first installer after filtering and sorting

tasks.instruction: For an $18,000 solar project with mid-to-high credit, compare financing options, filter to those with an upfront payment below $3,000 and estimated monthly payments below $150, then select the option with the lowest APR and save a draft pre-application.

criteria.selection_rule: after applying upfront and monthly payment filters, choose the financing option with the lowest APR
